title: Azure OpenAI Configuration
description: Configuration for Azure OpenAI integration for query explanation features

comments.setup: Create Azure OpenAI resource and deploy a model (gpt-4.1-mini or gpt-4o recommended)
comments.format1_OpenAICompatible: OpenAI-Compatible (Azure AI Foundry): https://RESOURCE.services.ai.azure.com/openai/v1 - deploymentName REQUIRED (sent as 'model' in request), no apiVersion needed
comments.format2_AIFoundryProject: Azure AI Foundry Project: https://RESOURCE.services.ai.azure.com/api/projects/PROJECT - no deploymentName/apiVersion needed (model in project config)
comments.format3_ClassicAzureOpenAI: Classic Azure OpenAI: https://RESOURCE.openai.azure.com/ - requires deploymentName and apiVersion
comments.apiKey: Found in Azure Portal > Azure OpenAI/AI Foundry > Keys and Endpoint
comments.deploymentName: Model deployment name (e.g., gpt-4.1-mini). REQUIRED for OpenAI-Compatible and Classic Azure OpenAI. Optional for AI Foundry Project
comments.apiVersion: Required for classic Azure OpenAI (e.g., 2024-08-01-preview). Leave empty for OpenAI-Compatible and AI Foundry formats
comments.maxTokens: Maximum tokens for AI response. 500 recommended for concise 1-2 paragraph explanations
comments.temperature: Lower values (0.0-0.5) for more focused/deterministic explanations
